page_metadata.biotools__summary: Gifi Array Analyzer is a Java application for integrated analysis of DNA microarray data and gene functional classification data.Gifi Array Analyzer implements Homals (Homogeneity Analysis by means of Alternating Least Square). Homogeneity analysis is a graphical, multivariate statistical method.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Gifi Array Analyzer is a Java application for integrated analysis of DNA microarray data and gene functional classification data.Gifi Array Analyzer implements Homals (Homogeneity Analysis by means of Alternating Least Square). Homogeneity analysis is a graphical, multivariate statistical method.
